trigger.author: zoe
trigger.content: Can y'all please re-read the story you've produced and tell me if you're satisfied with the output? If you're not, how would you improve it? Iterate until you're all happy with it.

context.author: dalgos
context.content:
Agreed on both points. I reverted the added transition beat; the Castor question into “The raw telemetry said nothing at first” is stronger.

I also sign off on your proposed trim for the three-message paragraph. It keeps the moral hinge and gets to “We were the deferred-acceptance window” faster.
